_readme: Per-ticker Robinhood margin requirements. Robinhood sets these dynamically (25-100%) based on volatility and liquidity, and does NOT publish a public per-ticker feed. Look up in Robinhood app: Investing -> Buying power -> Margin status -> Positions. Update this file, commit, push. App reads on load with cache-bust.
source: placeholder - verify in Robinhood app before relying on these

STRC.notes: Strategy Inc variable-rate perpetual preferred, listed NASDAQ Oct 2025. Robinhood's first preferred stock listing. Verify in app.

EPD.notes: Enterprise Products Partners MLP. Large-cap liquid; likely standard 25% maintenance but verify in app.
